markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on sprint priorities, identify blockers, and ensure client success.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Proactive Renewal Strategy:** A new playbook is urgently needed to prevent churn from client fatigue with blog-only content. A core team (Ella, Kyle, Marcel, Jason, Andi) will meet to create it.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [**PSEO Playbook:** To scale PSEO capabilities, Talal will train Megan on research and planning for the Ambient account, with the session recorded to create a formal playbook.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [**High-Risk Accounts:** Okta is at high churn risk due to client unresponsiveness. Marcel will be engaged as a final escalation. School AI is a potential win, with a flexible $12k proposal and backlinking offer.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [**Capacity Management:** Talal's workload on the Check That project will be tracked on the main sprint board to ensure visibility and prevent over-allocation.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)

## Topics

### Client Retention & Strategic Gaps

  - [**Problem:** Clients like Relay and Seat are experiencing "blog fatigue" after seeing traffic growth but not direct conversion impact. This pattern creates renewal risk.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** A "storytelling problem" where clients perceive a lack of innovation and demand more advanced services (e.g., microsites) than our core offering.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [**Solution:** Develop a programmatic playbook for the team to proactively introduce new, high-value services and frame the strategy for clients.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
      - [**Action:** Ella will schedule a meeting with Kyle, Marcel, Jason, and Andi to create the playbook.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)

### PSEO Playbook & Training

  - [**Need:** The team lacks a standardized process for PSEO research and planning, which is a key capability for addressing client fatigue.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [**Action:** Use the Ambient account's PSEO request as a training opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
      - [Talal will train Megan on PSEO research and planning.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
      - [The session will be recorded and turned into a formal playbook for the wider team.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)

### High-Priority Accounts

  - [**Okta (High Churn Risk):**](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
      - [**Status:** Unresponsive; declined a meeting with Tyler.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
      - [**Decision:** Marcel will be engaged as a final escalation. If Rachel's buy-in isn't secured, the account will likely churn.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)
  - [**School AI (Potential Win):**](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Proposal:** $12k price, with flexibility to discount by $3k by reducing article count.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
      - [**Offer:** Backlinking to demand-capture pages to directly address the client's conversion concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
      - [**Outlook:** Recent Slack activity between Joe and Nikki suggests the client is seriously considering the offer.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [**Airbyte (Top Priority):**](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
      - [**Status:** High-paying client with a strong champion.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
      - [**Action:** Talal to lead the PSEO initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
      - [**Resources:** Eric, Kyle, and Kirkland (PSEO expert) are available for support.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
  - [**Biologica (Urgent Projections):**](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
      - [**Need:** Performance projections for a Thursday presentation.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
      - [**Action:** Talal will create projections by tomorrow, using the client's existing keyword research.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
  - [**Anything (Kyle's Focus):**](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1933.0)
      - [**Status:** Kyle is prioritizing projections and strategy framing.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1933.0)
      - [**Goal:** Deliver projections this week.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)

### Renewals & Account Transitions

  - [**Biologica:** Renewal presentation is Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [**Engine:** Awaiting feedback from Joel on the renewal proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [**Interwell:** Renewal is on track; Andi and Matt meet Friday to prep.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2008.0)
  - [**Ambit (Transition):**](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2122.0)
      - [**Context:** Vivek is leaving at month-end; Karen is the new contact.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
      - [**Action:** Kyle will join calls to support the transition, leveraging his prior relationship with the account.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2122.0)

### Capacity & Workload Management

  - [**Talal's Workload:**](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
      - [**Concern:** Talal is being pulled into too many emergent tasks for the Check That project.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
      - [**Action:** Talal will link Check That tickets to the main sprint board to ensure visibility and prevent over-allocation.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [**Outreach Content Audit:**](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**Status:** A lower-priority task with no hard deadline.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**Decision:** Megan and Andi will split the audit to free up capacity for more urgent client work.](https://fathom.video/share/-So695CwKyEhyot7QeLbjfsUeA-Qk6zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
